there are cinders all over the patio again so either the fire pit wasnt out all the way or the wind has started participating in household choices
if youre at the store can you get paper towels and also check your shoes bc somebody tracked cinders into the hall and now it looks like we barbecue indoors
the little grill dump by the fence still has warm cinders in it and i would love to stop discovering that kind of thing by smell
he said the fire was dead but there were still cinders in the bottom this morning so apparently his definition of out is mostly emotional
dont let the kids poke the cinders again bc last time one of them came inside with a stick and way too much confidence
the fire pit is fine except for the part where the cinders keep blowing onto the chairs and making everything look lightly post disaster
if you move the ash bucket make sure there arent live cinders in it first bc i am not interested in a preventable sequel
there were cinders in the driveway after last night and now i get to wonder how far those things traveled while everybody was saying relax
the cleanup would be easier if someone hadnt dumped cinders right next to the trash can like that was a normal adult decision
the cinders by the garden bed are why im not buying the whole 'it was completely cold' story that got told around breakfast
someone needs to stop tapping the grill out by the back steps bc the cinders keep ending up where feet and bad timing live
i know the fire looked low but low and cinders only are not the same thing no matter how casually people keep using those phrases
there are little black cinders on the porch rug now which means one of two things happened and both of them involve somebody not thinking past the first step
if youre gonna clean out the smoker dont leave the cinders in a cardboard box like youre trying to teach the insurance company a lesson
the wind picked up and now there are cinders in the bird bath which feels rude on multiple levels
he dumped the cinders by the shed and said rain would take care of it which sounds like a sentence from a person who does not own the shed
the dog came in with cinders on his paws and i would really love for the backyard to stop offering him little souvenir disasters
if you see gray stuff by the grill just know its not dirt its cinders and yes that distinction matters when children are involved
there were still cinders under the logs this morning and i only know that bc i made the mistake of checking instead of living in peace
the patio furniture has tiny cinder marks now and i am trying to be calm about a very specific kind of preventable damage
dont sweep the cinders toward the mulch. i cant believe im typing that and yet here we are as a household
the county burn notice says one thing and the backyard cinders say somebody interpreted that guidance creatively
if the package is by the fire pit just make sure there arent cinders under the box bc im tired of objects around here picking up weird backstories
there are cinders in the driveway seam now and somehow that makes the whole place feel more dramatic than it deserves
he said it was just a few cinders but the chair cushion would probably describe the situation with stronger language
the grill tray still had cinders in it when i went to dump it and now i trust exactly one person less than i did yesterday
if you smell smoke by the side yard its probably the cinders in that metal bucket continuing to have opinions
someone tracked cinders into the mud room and now every step looks like a tiny bad decision in sequence
the old fire ring is basically just a cinder generator now and i dont know why we keep acting like that is the same as ambiance
dont put the folding chairs near the cinders next time unless the goal is to add tiny mystery holes to all the fabric
there were cinders in the flower bed this morning and i know that isnt the biggest problem in the world but it is definitely the dumbest one on my list today
if he says the fire was out ask him about the cinders in the ash pan and just enjoy the little pause before the next lie arrives
the patio looked fine until the sun hit it and suddenly every cinder showed up like evidence under bad lighting
i found cinders in the dog water bowl which means the wind was stronger than advertised or everybody stood around underestimating physics again
the cinders by the fence are why i am not thrilled about using the grill tonight even though apparently that makes me the cautious one
someone needs to empty the ash bucket properly bc right now it is mostly cinders and false confidence
the wind kept pushing cinders under the table and now clean up feels like searching for tiny burnt commas
if youre already outside can you check whether the cinders by the pit are actually dead this time before the kids go back there with marshmallows and poor judgment
there are cinders on the porch steps and i do not enjoy any sentence that starts with there are cinders on
the little black marks on the concrete are from cinders not dirt and i would appreciate it if everybody stopped scrubbing the wrong problem
he dumped the cinders then immediately forgot he dumped the cinders which is honestly the most dangerous stage of that whole process
if the grill lid is open again cover it before the cinders start traveling. i know this sounds dramatic but so did every other warning right before cleanup
the cinders were still warm at noon and im sorry but by noon i expect a fire related issue to either be over or officially belong to somebody else
there are cinders in the corner by the gate now so i guess the wind chose a new storage solution without consulting us
dont let the kids draw in the cinders with sticks. it always starts as a harmless little activity and ends with me saying a sentence no one should need
the old planter has cinders in it because someone used it as a temporary ash can and then apparently fell in love with the word temporary
if youre moving the grill be aware there are cinders under it still and they will absolutely make themselves your problem at the worst possible moment
the backyard would be much calmer if we could have one fire related event without cinders showing up in places cinders should not have a social life
there were cinders in the laundry room somehow and at that point i stopped asking for the chain of events because the answer was clearly going to annoy me
the cinders are probably harmless now but i really hate the probably stage of anything that used to be on fire
